             Program Results: Specialties Matching Service® 2022-2026 Appointment Years




This report lists every institution that participated in the Specialties Matching Service®, along with the number of
positions offered and filled for each of the institution’s programs over the past five appointment years. Presenting
five years of data not only provides information on the current appointment year but allows for side-by-side
comparison of this information over time. Before 2025, information regarding the current appointment year was
included in Results and Data: Specialties Matching Service. Beginning in 2025, program results are exclusively
provided within this dedicated report.

Institutions are arranged alphabetically within the state. The listing includes the institution name (abbreviated in
some instances); the program code, which identifies each program; and the quota (the number of positions
offered by the program) and number of applicants matched with that program for each of the last five appointment
years.

There are three reasons why a program that ranked an adequate number of applicants did not fill its quota: (1) the
applicants preferred other programs; (2) the applicants did not rank the program; or (3) the applicants had
withdrawn from the Match. There are also three reasons why applicants may not have matched with their most
preferred program: (1) the program was filled with applicants it preferred; (2) the program did not rank the
applicant; or (3) the program had withdrawn from the Match.

NRMP Program Code Structure

The NRMP program code is a 9-11 character code consisting of the following components:

   •   The first four characters are the NRMP Institution Code.
   •   The fifth through the seventh characters represent specialty code obtained from the first three digits of the
       program’s ACGME Code or an NRMP-designated specialty code for non-ACGME accredited programs
       and designates the specialty (see below).
   •   The eighth character represents the program type: F - Fellowship program, S - Fellowship Subspecialty
   •   Characters 9-11 represent the track number:
       0 - first program/track in the specialty and program type at the institution
       1 - second program/track in the same specialty and program type at the same institution (e.g., 34th Street
       Clinic)
       2 - third program/track in the same specialty and program type at the same institution (e.g., Rural Clinic).
